deep_dive.title: Tight-Frame Reconstruction for Acoustic Intensity Estimation Using Cardioid Microphone Pairs
deep_dive.abstract: This paper investigates acoustic intensity estimation using pairs of cardioid microphones based on the cardioid-cardioid (C-C) method. Unlike conventional pressure-difference techniques, the C-C method is intrinsically less sensitive to the relationship between microphone spacing and acoustic wavelength. However, practical microphones inevitably deviate from ideal cardioid directivity, producing direction-dependent estimation errors.   To improve robustness against such errors, a measurement framework based on spherical tight-frame microphone configurations is proposed. Directional intensity components measured along multiple axes are combined to reconstruct the three-dimensional acoustic intensity vector. Furthermore, directivity errors are represented using Legendre polynomial and spherical harmonic expansions, and a geometry-dependent leakage metric is introduced to quantify the error-suppression capability of different microphone arrangements.   Theoretical analysis and numerical simulations demonstrate that tight-frame configurations effectively suppress direction-dependent errors through geometric averaging. The proposed leakage metric successfully predicts the influence of microphone directivity imperfections on the reconstructed intensity vector. The results further indicate that accurate wide-band acoustic-intensity estimation can be achieved even with relatively large microphone spacings, which are generally impractical in conventional pressure-difference approaches. % The proposed framework provides a physically interpretable and practically useful approach for acoustic intensity measurement using directional microphone arrays.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: tight-frame reconstruction for acoustic intensity estimation using cardioid microphone pairs
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 使用心形麦克风对的紧框架重建用于声强估计
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 使用心形麦克风对的紧框架重建用于声强估计
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 使用心形麦克风对的紧框架重建用于声强估计
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: This paper proposes a spherical tight-frame microphone configuration to improve acoustic intensity estimation robustness, directly addressing geometric calibration of acoustic sensor arrays.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 该论文针对心形麦克风对声强估计中方向依赖性误差问题，提出基于球形紧框架的测量框架。通过沿多个轴组合方向性强度分量重建三维声强矢量，并校正麦克风方向图偏差。该方法本质上是声学传感器阵列的几何校准，可提升声源定位和声学追踪的精度。

deep_dive.title: DOA Estimation from One-Bit Magnitude-Only Measurements via Sign-Consistency Optimization
deep_dive.abstract: The direction-of-arrival (DOA) estimation problem using one-bit quantized magnitude-only measurements is studied, where magnitude-only measurements offer robustness against phase errors, thereby avoiding the need for array calibration, while one-bit quantization significantly reduces hardware cost and system complexity. As their direct combination results in meaningless constant measurements, we formulate a sign-consistency optimization problem using a smooth logistic surrogate with ell_2,1-norm regularization to promote joint sparsity. To solve this problem, a proximal-gradient algorithm is developed with guaranteed convergence to a critical point. Numerical results demonstrate that the proposed method achieves accuracy comparable to coherent one-bit baselines under ideal conditions, while maintaining robust performance under severe phase errors that substantially impair coherent methods.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: DOA estimation from one-bit magnitude-only measurements using sign-consistency optimization
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 利用符号一致性优化从一位幅度测量中实现DOA估计
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 利用符号一致性优化从一位幅度测量中实现DOA估计
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 利用符号一致性优化从一位幅度测量中实现DOA估计
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Proposes a sign-consistency optimization with logistic surrogate for DOA estimation from one-bit quantized magnitude-only measurements, avoiding array calibration and achieving comparable accuracy.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 针对传统DOA估计中对阵列校准和相位信息的依赖，本文提出一种基于一位幅度测量的符号一致性优化方法。通过平滑逻辑代理和l2,1范数正则化构造稀疏优化问题，并采用近端梯度算法求解。数值实验表明该方法在避免校准的同时获得了与传统方法相当的估计精度，降低了硬件成本。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 针对传统DOA估计中对阵列校准和相位信息的依赖，本文提出一种基于一位幅度测量的符号一致性优化方法。通过平滑逻辑代理和l2,1范数正则化构造稀疏优化问题，并采用近端梯度算法求解。数值实验表明该方法在避免校准的同时获得了与传统方法相当的估计精度，降低了硬件成本。

quick_skim.title: What VGGT Knows About Overlap: Probing Geometric Foundation Models for Co-Visibility
quick_skim.abstract: A fundamental challenge in 3D reconstruction and robotic localization is co-visibility: determining which image pairs share overlapping visible surfaces, particularly in scenarios with minimal overlap. We demonstrate that VGGT implicitly encodes co-visibility as an emergent behavior: without any supervision for this task, its internal representations exhibit a clear hierarchical structure mirroring that of large language models, i.e. early layers build a 3D-aware scene representation, while late layers act as dedicated co-visibility reasoners. In particular, we identify layer L17 as a negative anchor that consistently routes non-co-visible pairs for this backbone, regardless of the evaluation setting, providing task-grounded evidence of layer specialization in a geometry-grounded foundation model. Building on this, we introduce Co-VGGT, which freezes VGGT and trains only a lightweight layer-wise mixture-of-experts head (less than 7.5M parameters) to classify co-visibility from RGB alone, treating each layer as a specialized expert whose geometric abstraction is adaptively weighted per input pair. On the Co-VisiON benchmark, Co-VGGT surpasses the human annotation baseline and improves over prior work by more than 25% pairwise and 10% multiview. Pairwise predictions are well-calibrated (ECE=0.030), enabling direct use as edge weights in visibility graphs for downstream SfM and SLAM pipelines without post-hoc correction. Code and data are available.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: geometric foundation model for co-visibility relevant to sensor alignment and calibration
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 几何基础模型用于共视性判断，与传感器对齐和几何校准相关
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 几何基础模型用于共视性判断，与传感器对齐和几何校准相关
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 几何基础模型用于共视性判断，与传感器对齐和几何校准相关
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Probes VGGT, a geometric foundation model, and finds it implicitly encodes co-visibility, a key capability for geometric calibration and sensor alignment tasks.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 该论文研究了VGGT几何基础模型，发现其内部表示隐式编码了共视性信息，无需专门训练即可判断图像对是否共享重叠表面。这一能力对于3D重建和机器人定位中的几何校准与传感器对齐至关重要。通过分析模型各层，识别出特定层（L17）作为负锚点，持续区分非共视对，为几何校准提供新的工具和见解。

quick_skim.title: Low-Altitude ISAC With Spherical Directly-Connected Antenna Array: Performance Analysis and Beamforming Optimization
quick_skim.abstract: The safety development requirements of low-altitude economy (LAE) renders the robust low-altitude airspace monitoring critical important than ever before. Integrated sensing and communication (ISAC) as one of the key development trends of 6G provides potential solutions for the LAE. However, conventional antenna arrays suffer from limited three-dimensional (3D) sensing coverage and degraded angular resolution at high elevation angles. To address these challenges, this paper investigates low-altitude ISAC systems enabled by the recently proposed spherical directly-connected antenna array (DCAA). By carefully deploying multiple simple uniform planar arrays (sUPAs) over a spherical surface, without relying on any phase shifter, spherical DCAA enjoys advantages of full 3D coverage, superior and uniform angular resolution, enhanced energy-focusing and low hardware cost. In this paper, we first characterizes the sensing performance of the spherical DCAA, in terms of the sensing signal-to-noise ratio (SNR), area average probability of detection, and Cramér-Rao lower bounds (CRLBs) for both elevation and azimuth angle estimation. Then, a low-altitude ISAC optimization problem is formulated to maximize the worst-case sensing SNR over a prescribed aerial region while satisfying the communication quality-of-service requirements of ground users. To effective solve this mixed-integer non-convex problem, we develop a novel greed-based joint array selection and beamforming optimization framework. Simulation results demonstrate that spherical DCAA significantly outperforms conventional UPA in terms of sensing coverage, angle estimation accuracy, and communication-sensing SNR tradeoff, highlighting its potential for future low-altitude ISAC systems.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: spherical antenna array geometry and beamforming optimization for ISAC
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 球面天线阵列几何设计和波束成形优化用于集成感知与通信

quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Investigates low-altitude ISAC with spherical directly-connected antenna array, analyzes performance and optimizes beamforming for improved 3D sensing coverage and angular resolution.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对低空经济中三维感知覆盖和角度分辨率不足的问题，本文研究了基于球面直接连接天线阵列（DCAA）的集成感知与通信系统。通过精心部署多个均匀平面阵列于球面，无需复杂馈电网络。进行了性能分析和波束成形优化，为低空环境下的传感器阵列几何校准提供了新方案。

quick_skim.title: Spatial-Frequency Cued Generative Fixed-Filter Active Noise Control Based on Deep Learning in Reverberant Environments
quick_skim.abstract: Generative fixed-filter active noise control (GFANC) effectively attenuates noise with diverse frequency characteristics through the combination of sub control filters. However, it does not incorporate the spatial information of the noise source, which limits its performance, particularly in reverberant environments. To address this limitation, this paper proposes a novel spatial-frequency cued GFANC (SF-GFANC) method that exploits both three-dimensional (3D) spatial and frequency information of the noise source. Specifically, a multi-task convolutional recurrent neural network (CRNN) is designed to estimate the source distance, elevation angle, and azimuth angle as spatial cues, while predicting the combination weights of sub control filters as frequency cues. These spatial-frequency cues jointly guide the generation of the appropriate control filter. In addition, a theoretical analysis of the optimal control filter in reverberant environments is presented, highlighting the importance of 3D spatially conditioned control filter design. Evaluations using both simulated and measured acoustic paths demonstrate that the CRNN is robust to unseen acoustic environments and noise types. Furthermore, the results confirm that SF-GFANC outperforms representative ANC algorithms when handling noise sources across diverse 3D locations and frequency characteristics in reverberant environments.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: sound source localization via spatial cue estimation using deep learning
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 基于深度学习的空间线索估计实现声源定位
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 基于深度学习的空间线索估计实现声源定位
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 基于深度学习的空间线索估计实现声源定位
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Proposes SF-GFANC, a deep learning method for active noise control that estimates source distance, elevation, and azimuth from 3D spatial cues using a CRNN, improving performance in reverberant environments.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 该论文针对传统主动噪声控制方法忽视噪声源空间信息导致混响环境下性能受限的问题，提出了一种空间-频率联合的生成式固定滤波器主动噪声控制方法（SF-GFANC）。方法使用多任务卷积循环神经网络（CRNN）同时估计声源的距离、仰角和方位角等三维空间线索，并预测组合滤波器系数。实验结果表明，该方法在混响环境下能有效利用空间信息提升降噪性能，从而验证了空间线索对于声源定位和噪声控制的重要性。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 该论文针对传统主动噪声控制方法忽视噪声源空间信息导致混响环境下性能受限的问题，提出了一种空间-频率联合的生成式固定滤波器主动噪声控制方法（SF-GFANC）。方法使用多任务卷积循环神经网络（CRNN）同时估计声源的距离、仰角和方位角等三维空间线索，并预测组合滤波器系数。实验结果表明，该方法在混响环境下能有效利用空间信息提升降噪性能，从而验证了空间线索对于声源定位和噪声控制的重要性。

quick_skim.title: Investigating the Integration of Spatial Information in Foundation-Model-Based Speaker Diarization
quick_skim.abstract: Spatial information gleaned from multi-channel input has been shown to lead to improvements in meeting processing tasks like diarization and source separation. At the same time, diarization based on features extracted by large pretrained single-channel foundation models, such as WavLM, achieved state-of-the-art performance. This work compares three approaches to integrate spatial features into foundation model-based diarization systems: the cascade of a beamformer and a single-channel foundation model, a multi-channel foundation model, and the conditioning of the downstream network on explicitly extracted spatial features. Results show that the beamformer front-end is even detrimental to diarization performance in regions of overlapped speech, while best performance is achieved with the conditioning, demonstrating that the incorporation of explicit spatial features is a competitive approach to foundation-model-supported diarization. This approach is further subjected to a detailed error analysis showing that the conditioning system removes errors to a good extent that would occur when either only spectral or only spatial features were used.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: multi-channel spatial feature integration for diarization, beamforming front-end
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 多通道空间特征集成用于日记化，涉及波束成形前端
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 多通道空间特征集成用于日记化，涉及波束成形前端
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 多通道空间特征集成用于日记化，涉及波束成形前端
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Compares three approaches to integrate spatial information from multi-channel audio into foundation-model diarization: beamformer cascade, multi-channel model, and spatial feature conditioning; beamformer can be detrimental.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对多通道录音说话人日记化任务，本文系统地比较了三种将空间信息集成到预训练单通道基础模型的方法：级联波束成形器、多通道基础模型以及显式提取空间特征。实验表明波束成形前端在某些区域甚至损害性能。该研究为声阵列空间信息的利用提供了重要启示，其方法可迁移至声源定位中的阵列处理。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 针对多通道录音说话人日记化任务，本文系统地比较了三种将空间信息集成到预训练单通道基础模型的方法：级联波束成形器、多通道基础模型以及显式提取空间特征。实验表明波束成形前端在某些区域甚至损害性能。该研究为声阵列空间信息的利用提供了重要启示，其方法可迁移至声源定位中的阵列处理。
